name: Crumb Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble shortening into sugar and flour. Reserve 3/4 cup of the mixture for topping.
2. To the remaining dry ingredients, add shortening, milk and egg. Mix well and place in a deep, 8-inch square baking dish.
3. Cover with the reserved 3/4 cup crumbs. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes or until done.
